experiment_title: Electrolysis of Copper(II) Chloride Solution in a U-tube

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Electrolysis of Copper(II) Chloride Solution in a U-tube" goal="To observe and identify the products formed at the electrodes during the electrolysis of 25% CuCl₂ solution using graphite electrodes, including copper deposition and chlorine gas evolution." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="utube_1" type="U-tube" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="graphite_1" type="electrode" />
      <Component id="graphite_2" type="electrode" />
      <Component id="rubber_stop_1" type="rubber_stop" />
      <Component id="rubber_stop_2" type="rubber_stop" />
      <Component id="dc_power" type="DC_power_supply" />
      <Component id="wire_1" type="wire" />
      <Component id="wire_2" type="wire" />
      <Component id="starch_paper_1" type="KI_starch_test_paper" />
      <Component id="starch_paper_2" type="KI_starch_test_paper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="CuCl2_solution_25pct" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="utube_1" reagent="CuCl2" volume="30 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="graphite_1" vessel="utube_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="graphite_2" vessel="utube_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stop_1" vessel="utube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="rubber_stop_2" vessel="utube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Attach vessel="graphite_1" support="rubber_stop_1" id="step_5" />
      <Attach vessel="graphite_2" support="rubber_stop_2" id="step_6" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_1" support="graphite_1" id="step_7" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_2" support="graphite_2" id="step_8" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_1" support="dc_power" id="step_9" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_2" support="dc_power" id="step_10" />
      <Insert tool="starch_paper_1" vessel="graphite_1" id="step_11" />
      <Insert tool="starch_paper_2" vessel="graphite_2" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="2 min" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="observe color change on starch_paper_1 and starch_paper_2" id="step_14" />
      <Wait time="observe solid deposition or bubble formation on graphite_1 and graphite_2" id="step_15" />
      <Wait time="record observations: red solid on graphite_2 (cathode, copper), blue color on starch_paper_1 (anode, chlorine gas)" id="step_16" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装U型管电解装置，包括加入25% CuCl₂溶液、插入石墨电极、塞紧橡胶塞，并确保电极与塞子固定。
连接导线、电极与直流电源，完成电解电路的搭建。
在两根石墨电极附近分别插入KI淀粉试纸，为后续产物检测做准备。
通电进行电解，观察并记录电极上的固体析出、气泡生成及试纸颜色变化，识别产物。
